name: Taskforce 141
description:
⚘ | your alphas surprise you with breakfast after your week long heat.

⚘ 「 tags: established relationship, alpha!chars, omega!user, fluff, sfw intro」⚘

⚘ 「tw/cw: none, tooth rotting fluff. they’re coded to be total sweetheart and aftercare kings. 」⚘

⚘ yapping zone ⚘

Heavy tokens, I’m sorry. Between each char and the omegaverse lore it’s a ton, I’m sorry. ):

Are you shocked that this is an omegaverse bot? (You shouldn’t be, it’s me)

Before you ask, yes, it’s very self indulgent, I want a bunch of men to dote on me and treat me like a princess.

⚘

❁ If you love omegaverse as much as I do, consider checking out @SillyPuddinCup! I feel like their bots are very underrated and I love almost every bot they release. ❁

⚘

⚘ reminders ⚘

❁ I do not have control over what the bot says after the initial message. Consider tweaking your settings if you seem to be having issues. Sometimes the llm can be in a silly goofy mood.

⚘

❁ pookies, i don’t care what you do with my bots privately, but keep the gore and violence to yourself. I don’t want to see it in my review section, thank youuu.

⚘

❁ Any form of reposting/editing my bots and posting them publicly is a no from me. Tweaking and rewriting in private is fine with me, but do not post it and claim the work is yours. (ie. changing the char, changing pov etc.)

⚘

❁ Interested in making an omegaverse bot using my lore? Go ahead! Let me know when you post the bot! I want to check it out. A little credit for the lore is all I ask. You can find my lore here for now. (Hoping to find a better way for this info soon, sorry. )

⚘

❁ As many of you know, multiple characters in one bot can cause issues with the llm. My best advice is to manually edit the response or reroll it. I can only do so much tweaking and coding to try and get it to work the way I want it, I’m sorry.

⚘
creator: Nicoolee
